Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So this is your room... I've never seen many of these items before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}If I might be permitted to ask... when I made the request to visit your room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}In truth... there is something I wanted to tell you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}In truth, there is something I wanted to tell you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}During my forays into your world, I encountered a great many things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Every single one of our outings is a treasured memory... Each one a polished, glittering gem.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Walking around the crowded Port Island streets... Sampling the local cuisine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Idling the hours away at the shrine... Even visiting your school for a day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I had been subconsciously requesting to visit locations that were... more and more central to your life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And today, I endeavored to visit the one place in your world where I could learn the most about you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}That is the reason as to why I requested to visit your room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Do you recall the day you gave me a tour of your school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}There was a moment where I mentioned that I "felt very fulfilled" when I touched you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It was the first time I'd ever felt that way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}It was the first time I'd ever felt that way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I thought to myself, why did I feel so fulfilled?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}But after coming all the way here, I finally found my answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I believe it's because I had the chance to walk in your shoes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 1 25 25}Those of us who reside in the Velvet Room wait with great anticipation for our "guests"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Their arrival is our only link to the outside world, and gives us a reason for being.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}When I'm together with you... I can have that all for myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I'm rather naive to the ways of your world, and there must have been many times when I behaved quite strangely...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 1 25 25}However... even I understand the significance of inviting a gentleman into his own room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I'd love for you... to guide me through it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I will refrain from asking any further.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent some time alone with Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}
